en: The best words in English for describing people. One, scatterbrained.

en: Scatterbrained, it's so visual. I'm just so scatterbrained. It describes someone as disorganised and forgetful, all wrapped into one.

en: Well, I never did care for wishy-washy people.
And finally, people who focus on every tiny, unimportant detail and criticise absolutely everything, they are, let me know in the comments.
